_meta.author: kokonutd
_meta.title: Social Card
_meta.description:
A modern, interactive social media card component with engagement features. Supports dark mode, animations, and customizable content.

Features:
	•	Interactive engagement buttons (like, comment, share, bookmark)
	•	Link preview with custom icon
	•	Animated interactions
	•	Dark mode support
	•	Responsive design
	•	Customizable styling
	•	TypeScript support
